quotes.text: The present moment is the only moment available to us, and it is the door to all moments.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quotes.text: Feelings come and go like clouds in a windy sky. Conscious breathing is my anchor.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quotes.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: In the midst of movement and chaos, keep stillness inside of you.
quotes.author: Deepak Chopra

quotes.text: Breathe in deeply to bring your mind home to your body.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quotes.text: Almost everything will work again if you unplug it for a few minutes, including you.
quotes.author: Anne Lamott

quotes.text: The greatest weapon against stress is our ability to choose one thought over another.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Quiet the mind, and the soul will speak.
quotes.author: Ma Jaya Sati Bhagavati

quotes.text: You are the sky. Everything else is just the weather.
quotes.author: Pema Chödrön

quotes.text: Be where you are, not where you think you should be.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The only way to live is by accepting each minute as an unrepeatable miracle.
quotes.author: Tara Brach

quotes.text: Surrender to what is. Let go of what was. Have faith in what will be.
quotes.author: Sonia Ricotti

quotes.text: When you realize nothing is lacking, the whole world belongs to you.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Smile, breathe, and go slowly.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quotes.text: The soul always knows what to do to heal itself. The challenge is to silence the mind.
quotes.author: Caroline Myss

quotes.text: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Within you there is a stillness and a sanctuary to which you can retreat at any time.
quotes.author: Hermann Hesse

quotes.text: Each morning we are born again. What we do today is what matters most.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Life is a dance. Mindfulness is witnessing that dance.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.text: Wherever you are, be there totally.
quotes.author: Eckhart Tolle

quotes.text: Silence is not empty. It is full of answers.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Meditation is not about stopping thoughts, but recognizing that we are more than our thoughts.
quotes.author: Arianna Huffington

quotes.text: Every breath is a chance to begin again.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Respond; don't react. Listen; don't talk. Think; don't assume.
quotes.author: Raji Lukkoor

quotes.text: The best time to relax is when you don't have time for it.
quotes.author: Sydney J. Harris

quotes.text: Your calm mind is the ultimate weapon against your challenges.
quotes.author: Bryant McGill

quotes.text: Mindfulness is a way of befriending ourselves and our experience.
quotes.author: Jon Kabat-Zinn

quotes.text: Breathing in, I calm body and mind. Breathing out, I smile.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh
